allow: Bash(npx shadcn@latest add button card slider badge progress tabs dialog dropdown-menu input label select separator sheet textarea tooltip avatar scroll-area switch -y)

Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
Initial commit: StutterLab — evidence-based stuttering treatment webapp

Full Next.js 15 + React 19 + TypeScript + Tailwind 4 + shadcn/ui scaffold:
- Audio Lab \(DAF, FAF, Choral, Metronome\) via Web Audio API
- 90-day structured daily curriculum with 5 phases
- Dashboard with circular progress ring and daily practice plan
- Feared Words Trainer with phoneme drills
- Real-World Challenges system \(daily + weekly\)
- Educational content \(10 modules on stuttering science\)
- Exercise player with reading mode UI and waveform visualization
- AI Practice scenarios \(phone calls, interviews, etc.\)
- Voice Journal, Progress tracking, Community, SLP Connection
- CBT & Mindfulness module
- Warm peach/cream theme + dark mode support
- Landing page with $99/year Pro pricing
- Database schema \(Drizzle ORM + Neon.tech\) with 15 tables

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
Enable dark mode by default and add development roadmap

- Set dark class on <html> element for default dark mode
- Add inline script to prevent FOUC on theme load
- Add ROADMAP.md with 8-phase development plan and API requirements

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")
